task:
INSERT mode typing is still broken. Root cause: handle-click ALWAYS calls render-all! when clicking a node row, which destroys and recreates the contentEditable span, losing cursor position and focus. And after render-all!, there is no .focus() on the new span.

FIX:
1. In handle-click: if the clicked node is ALREADY focused AND mode is insert, do NOT call render-all! — just return and let the browser handle the click naturally for cursor positioning within the contentEditable span.
2. At the end of render-all!, if mode is :insert, find the focused node's contentEditable span and call .focus() on it.

Use replace_in_file. Export and task_complete when done.

;; ── Click Handler ──
(defn handle-click [e]
  (let [target (.-target e)
        row (.closest target ".node-row")]
    (when row
      (let [id (.getAttribute row "data-id")]
        (when id
          ;; If clicking the already-focused node in insert mode,
          ;; let the browser handle cursor positioning naturally.
          (if (and (= id (focused)) (= (mode) :insert))
            nil
            (do
              (focus! id)
              ;; If clicking the text area, enter insert mode
              (when (or (.matches target ".text-node")
                        (.matches target ".node-row"))
                (set-mode! :insert)
                (render-all!))
              (when (not (or (.matches target ".text-node")
                             (.matches target ".node-row")))
                (render-all!)))))))))

 458 | (defn handle-key [e]
 459 |   (let [key (.-key e)
 460 |         ctrl (.-ctrlKey e)
 461 |         m (mode)]
 462 |     
 463 |     ;; Global: Escape
 464 |     (when (= key "Escape")
 465 |       (.preventDefault e)
 466 |       (when (help?) (toggle-help!) (render-all!))
 467 |       (when (= m :insert)
 468 |         ;; Save current text before exiting insert mode
 469 |         (let [active-el (.-activeElement js/document)]
 470 |           (when (and active-el (.. active-el -classList (contains "text-node")))
 471 |             (set-text! (focused) (.-textContent active-el))))
 472 |         (set-mode! :normal)
 473 |         (render-all!))
 474 |       (js/clearTimeout @key-timer)
 475 |       (reset! key-seq [])
 476 |       (when (not= m :normal) (render-all!)))
 477 |     
 478 |     ;; Global: ? toggles help
 479 |     (when (and (= key "?") (not ctrl) (= m :normal) (not (help?)))
 480 |       (.preventDefault e)
 481 |       (toggle-help!)
 482 |       (render-all!))
 483 |     
 484 |     ;; Normal mode keys
 485 |     (when (= m :normal)
 486 |       (let [seq-str (str/join "" (conj @key-seq key))]
 487 |         (cond
 488 |           (= key "j") (do (.preventDefault e) (nav-down) (render-tree) (render-status-bar) (reset! key-seq []))
 489 |           
 490 |           (= key "k") (do (.preventDefault e) (nav-up) (render-tree) (render-status-bar) (reset! key-seq []))
 491 |           
 492 |           (= key "i") (do (.preventDefault e) (set-mode! :insert) (render-all!))
 493 |           
 494 |           (= key "o") (do (.preventDefault e)
 495 |                           (let [f (focused)
 496 |                                 nid (add-child! f)]
 497 |                             (set-mode! :insert)
 498 |                             (render-all!)))
 499 |           
 500 |           (= key "O") (do (.preventDefault e)
 501 |                           (let [f (focused)]
 502 |                             (when (not= f "root")
 503 |                               (let [nid (add-sibling-after! f)]
 504 |                                 (set-mode! :insert)
 505 |                                 (render-all!)))))
 506 |           
 507 |           (= key "h") (do (.preventDefault e) (collapse! (focused)) (render-tree) (render-status-bar))
 508 |           
 509 |           (= key "l") (do (.preventDefault e) (expand! (focused)) (render-tree) (render-status-bar))
 510 |           
 511 |           (= key "x") (do (.preventDefault e) (toggle-completed! (focused)) (render-tree) (render-status-bar))
 512 |           
 513 |           (= key ">") (do (.preventDefault e) (indent! (focused)) (render-tree) (render-status-bar))
 514 |           
 515 |           (= key "<") (do (.preventDefault e) (outdent! (focused)) (render-tree) (render-status-bar))
 516 |           
 517 |           (= key "G") (do (.preventDefault e) (nav-last) (render-tree) (render-status-bar) (reset! key-seq []))
 518 |           
 519 |           (= seq-str "gg") (do (.preventDefault e) (nav-first) (render-tree) (render-status-bar) (reset! key-seq []))
 520 |           
 521 |           (= seq-str "dd") (do (.preventDefault e) (delete-node! (focused)) (render-all!) (reset! key-seq []))
 522 |           
 523 |           ;; Otherwise track for multi-key sequences
 524 |           (not (contains? #{"Shift" "Control" "Alt" "Meta" "Tab"} key))

 526 |             (swap! key-seq conj key)

 528 |             (reset! key-timer (js/setTimeout (fn [] (reset! key-seq [])) 500))))))
